todos.title: Add scheduled tasks
todos.description: Create PowerShell scripts to register Windows Scheduled Tasks that run daily collection and weekly optimization. Files: scripts/automation/register_scheduled_tasks.ps1, scripts/automation/run_daily_job.ps1. Ensure tasks log output to data/logs/ and handle failures.

todos.title: Add GitHub Actions workflow
todos.description: Add a workflow `.github/workflows/auto-optimize.yml` to run the optimizer weekly and upload optimization results as artifacts. Use secrets for any API keys; workflow must be no-op if historical data missing.

todos.title: Add unit tests
todos.description: Add tests for `scripts/optimize_accuracy.py` and `scripts/collect_historical_results.py` under `tests/` and update CI to run them. Use small sample data in `tests/data/` for reliability.

todos.title: Add safe commit script
todos.description: Create `scripts/commit_optimization_results.ps1` to create a branch, add optimization results, commit, and push only if remote exists. Do not push by default; allow an env var `AUTO_PUSH=true` to enable pushing.

todos.title: Documentation & README updates
todos.description: Update `README.md` and add `docs/automation.md` describing scheduled tasks, workflows, and how to enable GitHub Actions securely using `scripts/setup_github_with_gh.ps1`.

todos.title: Run full test suite and lint
todos.description: Execute pytest and linter (ruff/mypy if configured), fix any issues discovered.

todos.title: Real-time lineup confirmation integration
todos.description: Integrate confirmed starting XI data 1 hour before match and trigger re-prediction when lineups are confirmed. Add connectors to SofaScore/FotMob and implement re-run hooks.

todos.title: Player-level impact scoring
todos.description: Implement player importance weights based on goals, assists, xG, defensive contributions; add `app/models/player_impact.py` and integrate with `enhanced_predictor.py`.

todos.title: Referee tendency database
todos.description: Scrape referee historical data, build tendency profiles (cards, penalties, home favoritism), apply adjustments to predictions.

todos.title: Travel fatigue modeling
todos.description: Track fixture congestion and rest days; apply fatigue penalties when teams play in quick turnarounds (e.g., Thursday→Sunday).

todos.title: Historical data depth expansion
todos.description: Backfill 3-5 seasons of historical data for seasonal trend detection and long-term modeling; store as `data/historical/` snapshots.

todos.title: Ensemble model with disagreement detection
todos.description: Measure agreement between ELO, Poisson, and ML models and lower confidence when models diverge; flag matches as 'uncertain'.

todos.title: Match context classification
todos.description: Classify match context (title race, relegation, derby) and apply motivation multipliers to predictions.

todos.title: Score prediction vs outcome prediction separation
todos.description: Build a two-stage model: outcome classifier then conditional score predictor; use Bayesian updating to combine.

todos.title: Dynamic ELO with recency weighting
todos.description: Implement time-decayed ELO where recent matches have higher weight and tune decay via backtesting.

todos.title: Upset detection model
todos.description: Train a classifier to detect upset conditions (cups, derbies, manager bounce) and increase underdog probability when detected.

todos.title: First goal importance modeling
todos.description: Model first-goal probability separately and chain conditional outcome probabilities based on first-goal likelihood.

todos.title: Expected goals (xG) integration
todos.description: Integrate xG from FBref/Understat and use xG for form calculations and xG differential features.

todos.title: Shot quality metrics
todos.description: Add shot quality and big-chances metrics as features for forward-looking performance modeling.

todos.title: Defensive solidity metrics
todos.description: Add defensive stats (clean sheets, interceptions) and encode defensive ratings for goals-against predictions.

todos.title: Manager tactical style encoding
todos.description: Build manager profiles (possession, pressing) and encode tactical style as features for matchup effects.

todos.title: Venue-specific performance
todos.description: Track team performance at specific stadiums, apply venue adjustments where appropriate.

todos.title: Time-of-day and day-of-week effects
todos.description: Analyze historical performance by kickoff time and encode as categorical features.

todos.title: Isotonic regression calibration
todos.description: Apply isotonic regression to calibrate confidence scores against historical accuracy using tracked predictions.

todos.title: Prediction tracking and feedback loop
todos.description: Store predictions and results in a DB, auto-fetch results, calculate accuracy by league/team/confidence and feed back to model improvements.

todos.title: Confidence interval bounds
todos.description: Provide prediction intervals (e.g., 70% home win [60-80%]) via bootstrapping and report uncertainty bands.

todos.title: League-specific calibration
todos.description: Calibrate confidence separately per league based on historical accuracy.

todos.title: Avoid overconfidence on favorites
todos.description: Apply soft caps on extreme probabilities and adjust upset likelihoods based on backtesting evidence.

todos.title: Pre-match odds movement tracking
todos.description: Poll odds APIs hourly pre-match to detect sharp movements and adjust predictions when significant shifts occur.

todos.title: Social media sentiment analysis
todos.description: Monitor Twitter/X for injury rumors and team sentiment that may affect last-minute changes.

todos.title: Weather impact refinement
todos.description: Refine weather models by team style (passing teams vs direct teams) for conditional penalties.

todos.title: Historical backtesting framework
todos.description: Implement time-series cross-validation backtesting (rolling windows), track accuracy and Brier scores. This is in-progress and prioritized.

todos.title: A/B testing infrastructure
todos.description: Run parallel predictions of control vs treatment and compare accuracy with statistical testing (z-tests). Implement recording and evaluation flows.

todos.title: Brier score optimization
todos.description: Optimize model parameters to minimize Brier score in addition to accuracy metrics.

todos.title: Edge case documentation
todos.description: Flag high-confidence misses and document root causes (lineups, referee, red cards) for manual review and model improvements.

todos.title: Graceful degradation on data gaps
todos.description: Implement tiered fallbacks and confidence penalties for missing data sources to prevent crashes and poor predictions.

todos.title: Anomaly detection on inputs
todos.description: Detect impossible statistics and anomalous inputs; build a human review queue for flagged matches.

todos.title: Model staleness detection
todos.description: Alert on declines in rolling accuracy and trigger retraining when drift is detected.

todos.title: Multi-match accumulators
todos.description: Calculate joint probabilities for accumulators and model correlations between matches.

todos.title: Goal timing predictions
todos.description: Predict goal timing distributions (first half vs second half) for in-play strategies.

todos.title: Cards and corners predictions
todos.description: Add models for yellow cards, red cards and corners based on team style and referee tendencies.

todos.title: Both teams to score (BTTS) prediction
todos.description: Create a dedicated BTTS model to improve binary outcome accuracy for this market.

todos.title: Over/under goals at multiple lines
todos.description: Add O/U probability outputs for common lines (1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5) using Poisson or simulated distributions.

todos.title: Publication gate & thresholds
todos.description: Enforce publication thresholds (min confidence, min data_quality_score) from `config/settings.yaml`; redirect failing reports to `reports/simulated/` and add tests to prevent regressions.

todos.title: Historical backfill & re-run optimizer
todos.description: Backfill missing historical match results (use `scripts/collect_historical_results.py` and fallback connectors), then re-run optimization sweeps and save artifacts under `data/optimization_results/`.

todos.title: CI: synthetic detection & Windows runner
todos.description: Add a CI job to run the synthetic detection test and include a Windows runner to catch encoding/encoding-like issues and ensure the publish gate behaves correctly on Windows.

todos.title: Audit script for simulated reports
todos.description: Add `scripts/audit_synthetic_reports.py` to list `reports/simulated/` contents, flag items older than N days, and optionally open an issue or email maintainers.

todos.title: Integrate PredictionTracker into production
todos.description: Wire `app/models/prediction_tracker.py` into `enhanced_predictor.py` and report generation to ensure every prediction is recorded and updated when results arrive.

todos.title: Monitoring: synthetic rate alert
todos.description: Add monitoring to track the fraction of synthetic reports and alert via webhook if synthetic rate exceeds a threshold (e.g., 10% over 7 days).
